purpose: Per-parser-family AST-shape contract for the semantic-annotation grammar. Asserts the runtime AST that the generated semantic_annotation parser produces against tracked samples. The grammar's entry rule `semantic_annotation` has Sequence root and an object-literal `-> {type: "semantic_annotation", name: $3, value: $6}` annotation that the codegen-fix-landed-in-6ad4ffd would now apply once `generated/semantic_annotation_parser.rs` is regenerated through it. Until the regen happens, the entry rule's annotation drops at codegen.
doctrine: When the per-family regeneration of generated/semantic_annotation_parser.rs lands, the entry sample must flip current_content_kind from `sequence` to `json_object`, and drift_status to `aligned`. Structural assertions (object keys present, string values match) will then verify the typed-Json carrier carries the declared shape.

samples.name: type_integer
samples.drift_tracked_in: PGEN: per-family semantic_annotation regeneration follow-up; tracked parser predates the codegen fix from commit 6ad4ffd.
